# `AgentGraph` manifest

Reference for `kind: AgentGraph` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`AgentGraph.schema.json`](../schemas/AgentGraph.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: AgentGraph
metadata:
  id: example-graph
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example two-node graph.
spec:
  entry: start
  nodes:
  - id: start
    kind: Agent
    ref:
      id: example-agent
  - id: done
    kind: End
  edges:
  - from: start
    to: done
    concurrent: false
```
